items.q: How do you say 'I prefer pop music'?
items.why: Students add an article and misconjugate; 'lieber' expresses preference and no article is needed.
Students guess film genres; 'Horror-' marks a horror film.

items.q: How do you give an opinion about a TV programme?
items.why: Students misuse 'finden' and word order; 'ich finde + noun + adjective' gives a clear opinion.

items.q: What does 'die Mode' mean in this topic?
items.why: The answer examiners want is: Fashion. “A maths average” is the distractor this question was built around — if it tempted you, that's the exact gap to close.
